The Guru. however. Is In the 12lh house from the Chandra and its

The Guru is strong in the Navamsa chart.
The 'Shani. in the birth chart is in Sinha in the 71 " house from the
Lagna. The Shani is in its enemy's house but it is conjoined by its
dispositor. And in the Jth house the Shani is deemed better placed. The
Shani is lhe lord both of the Lagna and the Olandra·lagna and the
Lagna ha.ppens to be in the degrees which are very desirable. The
Shani fulty aspects the Lagna which it owns. The Shani conjoins the
Buddha whkh owns Trine both from the Lagna and the Cl\andra·lagna.
The Buddha accommodates in one of its houses the Maogal. which is
vt('f strong. The Shani is in the glf'l house from the Chandra.
The 'Shani is normal in the birt:h Chart.
